desc.0: When Stellar-Conduct is triggered, the surrounding area will transform into a Polestar Field for a short period of time, and when inside a Polestar Field, certain characters will enter the Radiance: Stellar-Conduct state, which grants various skill buffs.

fieldDesc.0: When Cryo comes in contact with Electro, a special Stellar-Conduct reaction will be triggered if certain conditions are also met.
fieldDesc.1: This reaction creates a special Polestar Field. The more times opponents are hit by Cryo or Electro DMG within the Polestar Field, the higher the Cryo DMG, Electro DMG, and Stellar-Conduct DMG they take.
